summary:
GEOGRAPHICAL READ
India colocation dominates with 281 signals across compute, power, network, colo, and build layers; GCC colo activity is minimal (UAE 11, Saudi 3, Bahrain 1, Kuwait 1). Whitespace targets show GCC operators (center3, Khazna, Gulf Data Hub, Ooredoo) active in UAE/Saudi with no India entity.

POLICY READ
India regulation shows 3 notices of attachment of bank/demat accounts (AP Nos. 15504-15509, 2026) — a government-affairs hook for distressed asset resolution or compliance advisory. Saudi Arabia regulation has 15 items (strongest tailwind) but only relevant if it pushes GCC players toward India — no direct link in data.

COMMERCIAL READ
India colo layer leads with 264 signals (top: Sify, CtrlS, Nxtra, Yotta, AdaniConnex, Google, Reliance, Tata, Oracle, Web Werks). India build layer has 1 signal; power layer 0. GCC power layer shows activity in Saudi (1) and Qatar (1), but no India linkage.
